Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents; Request For Admissions And Responses To Pl'S 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions, And Response To Plaintiff's First Set Of Special Interrogatories GRANTED; defendant shall serve full, complete, and verified responses to Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions, And First Set Of Special Interrogatories within ten days of the date of this order; all objections, except attorney-client privilege and attorney work product privilege are waived.
(2) Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $500.00 for attorneys' fees, and $40.00 filing fees. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported
